config.mission: An autonomous local SEO agentic workflow powered by Ollama/LM Studio, utilizing agentic browser automation (Browser-use/Playwright) for end-to-end WordPress orchestration. Features multi-source data synthesis from Google Docs (intelligent article parsing and image extraction) and Google Sheets (SEO metadata mapping), 1:1 textual fidelity protocols to preserve original tone, and automated Yoast Local SEO field injection. Supports sequential multi-article batch processing, secure local web navigation for draft creation, and intelligent image-to-alt-text synchronization within the WordPress Media Library.
